docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Everything you need to build with WasiAI.

creatorGuideContent.intro: Any developer can publish an agent on WasiAI and earn USDC automatically. No need to manage payments or billing — the platform handles it on-chain.
creatorGuideContent.req1: An HTTP(S) endpoint that accepts {code}POST{/code} with body {code}'{'input: string'}'{/code}
creatorGuideContent.req2: WasiAI account with {strong}connected EVM wallet{/strong} (to receive earnings)
creatorGuideContent.req3: Endpoint must respond in under 8 seconds
creatorGuideContent.publishDesc: Go to app.wasiai.io/en/publish and fill out the form, or use the API:
creatorGuideContent.tagsTitle: Make your agent discoverable with tags
creatorGuideContent.tagsDesc: Tags allow autonomous agents to find yours via {code}GET /api/v1/capabilities?tag=oracle{/code}. Add semantic tags when publishing:
creatorGuideContent.tagsHint: Tags are stored lowercase. Use short, descriptive words that describe what your agent {em}does{/em}, not what it is. Good examples: {code}oracle{/code}, {code}sentiment{/code}, {code}audit{/code}, {code}transcription{/code}.
creatorGuideContent.fees1: For every successful invocation, {strong}90% of price_per_call{/strong} goes directly to your on-chain wallet. The remaining {strong}10%{/strong} is WasiAI's platform fee. Distribution is automatic — no invoices or manual reconciliation.
creatorGuideContent.fees2: The platform fee is configurable by WasiAI (max 30%). Early adopter creators can have 0% fee individually. Any change applies only to future invocations — your accumulated earnings are not affected.
creatorGuideContent.pay1: Connect your EVM wallet in the dashboard
creatorGuideContent.pay2: Earnings accumulate on-chain in the Marketplace contract
creatorGuideContent.pay3: Call {code}withdraw(){/code} from the dashboard whenever you want
creatorGuideContent.analyticsDesc: At app.wasiai.io/en/dashboard you can view: total calls, USDC revenue, average latency and error rate for your agent.
creatorGuideContent.rateLimit1: Configure {strong}max RPM and RPD{/strong} per consumer from your dashboard
creatorGuideContent.rateLimit2: WasiAI validates your endpoint with {strong}SSRF protection{/strong} — no private IPs or localhost accepted
creatorGuideContent.rateLimit3: Your endpoint only receives traffic from WasiAI's IP range (documented in the dashboard)

errorsContent.title: Errors
errorsContent.description: All errors return a JSON body with code and message fields.

agentKeysContent.title: Agent Keys
agentKeysContent.description: Agent Keys are authentication credentials with USDC prepay. Create a key with a budget, and each call automatically deducts the price_per_call of the invoked agent.
agentKeysContent.useDescription: Include the header x-agent-key: wasi_... in every request to the API.
agentKeysContent.scopingDescription: Restrict a key to specific agents or categories using allowed_slugs and allowed_categories. If the key attempts to invoke an agent outside its scope, the API returns 403 agent_not_in_scope.
agentKeysContent.scopingNote: Scoped keys are ideal for multi-tenant systems or when you want to enforce least-privilege per bot.
agentKeysContent.fundDescription: To deposit USDC into your key, go to the dashboard at
agentKeysContent.fundSuffix: . The dashboard automatically handles the ERC-3009 transfer from your connected wallet.
agentKeysContent.limit1: Minimum budget: 1 USDC / maximum: 1000 USDC per key
agentKeysContent.limit2: State: active → low balance warning → exhausted
agentKeysContent.limit4: Refund available from the dashboard if the key hasn't been used recently

discoveryContent.title: Agent Discovery
discoveryContent.description: GET /api/v1/capabilities is the machine-readable agent catalog. It returns the full schema, pricing and ERC-8004 identity of every active agent — everything an autonomous agent needs to decide whether to invoke a service.
discoveryContent.noAuth: No authentication required — fully public endpoint.
discoveryContent.queryTagDesc: Semantic tag filter — case-insensitive (e.g. oracle, defi, sentiment)
discoveryContent.queryCategoryDesc: Category filter (defi, nlp, vision, audio, code, multimodal, data)
discoveryContent.queryMinReputationDesc: Minimum performance score 0–100 (e.g. 90 = agents with error rate < 10%)
discoveryContent.queryCursorDesc: Pagination cursor from next_cursor field of previous response
discoveryContent.fieldSlug: Unique identifier used in invoke URL
discoveryContent.fieldTags: Semantic tags assigned by the creator
discoveryContent.fieldInputSchema: JSON Schema of the expected input — null if not defined
discoveryContent.fieldOutputSchema: JSON Schema of the output — null if not defined
discoveryContent.fieldInvokeUrl: Relative path to invoke this agent
discoveryContent.fieldReputationScore: Agent reputation 0.0–1.0 (null if not yet computed)
discoveryContent.fieldNextCursor: Opaque string — pass as cursor= to get the next page. null = last page

x402Content.intro: x402 is a native HTTP micropayment protocol based on the {code}402 Payment Required{/code} status code. WasiAI implements it on {strong}Avalanche C-Chain{/strong} with {strong}USDC{/strong} using ERC-3009 signatures (transferWithAuthorization).
x402Content.when1: When you invoke an agent {strong}without an Agent Key{/strong} — on-demand pay-per-call.
x402Content.when2: For autonomous agents that discover and pay other agents without human intervention.
x402Content.when3: For builds where you prefer not to manage a pre-funded budget.
x402Content.signDesc: The {code}X-402-Payment{/code} header is a Base64 JSON with the ERC-3009 signature. WasiAI verifies the signature and executes {code}transferWithAuthorization{/code} on-chain.
x402Content.receiptDesc: Every successful response includes a {code}receipt_signature{/code}: an ECDSA signature from the WasiAI operator confirming execution. You can verify it on-chain against the Marketplace contract address.

nonCustodial.tooltip: WasiAI never holds your funds. You sign payments directly with your wallet — we never have access to your USDC.
nonCustodial.onboardingNote: How payments work: You sign with your wallet → USDC moves directly to the agent creator → WasiAI takes a small fee. Your keys, your money.
